impact: This advances the PP&D plan by ensuring normalized public documents retain deterministic provenance links to canonical source-index records, retrieval timestamps, and content checksums before any live crawl or authenticated automation is introduced.
summary: Add fixture-only public document provenance validation for normalized HTML/PDF records.
target_task: Task checkbox-35: Add fixture-only public document provenance validation that ties normalized HTML and PDF records back to canonical URL, retrieval timestamp, checksum, and source-index entry.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
